title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Oden, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro, Whitebeard Pirates as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Lord Oden, let us down!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WORO RO RO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Gennn!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the matter? It hasn't even been one minute yet, you know!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hmmm

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What kind of skin does he have?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The smoke is hot enough for us to die up here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep complaining and I'll punch you Raizeo!! All you have to do is let yourself be carried!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop moving, neko!! You are shaking everything up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Offer

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: 4 minutes have passed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was told this would end immediately.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I thought there would be more screams...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's more boring than expected...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and that they would die in a more spec- tacular fashion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Compose the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm looking forward to it finally ending, I'm done with this "idiot Lord".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Remember if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What idiot Lord!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Say that again and I'll kill you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who is that woman!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: She's dangerous! She's got a sword!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "A kunoich!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: URG! stop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You're the idiots!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: Captain, that's shinobu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: that one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What is stirring her up like that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to whom do you think you owe this peace you're living in today!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will only realise once you have lost Lord open!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will see how much he protected you from danger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi is neither a "shogun" nor a "dictator".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: orochi doesn't want to stand on top of others.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You hear me!? To me,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's everyone in this country!! They're culprits for oppressing the Kurozumi family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I wouldn't care if they died!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I received the rank of Shougun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And in order to exact my revenge!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 39 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
